channel.title: Burgers on Vegan Home Cooks
channel.description: Recent content in Burgers on Vegan Home Cooks

item.title: Novick Burger Formula
item.description:
If you prefer a write up: Brand New Vegan - Jeff Novick Bean Burgers

The Formula

  • 14 oz can no-salt beans
  • half cup rolled oats
  • half cup cooked brown rice (or any starch)
  • 2 tbsp tomato product (tomato sauce, paste, crushed tomatoes etc)
  • 2 tbsp mixed spice (be creative!)

mash them all up and bake!

The VHC Theme Song Burgers in Paradise
